word: H7884 - שִׁיחֹור לִבְנָת - Shîychôwr Libnâth - shee-khore' lib-nawth' - Shihor-libnath

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁיחור לבנת

Transliteration: shı̂ychôr libenâth

Phonetic: shee-khore' lib-nawth'

BDB Definition:

Shihor-libnath = "blackness of whiteness"
  1. a stream in Asher

Origin: from the same as H7883 and H3835

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
